_comment: Autonomous AGENT schedules (UTC cron). Each fires an agent via /agents/<agent> with a message. Agent actions still pass through the oversight gate + per-agent cost caps, so scheduled autonomy stays safe (money/fraud actions queue for human approval; low-risk runs auto). Add/remove freely. Start conservative and widen as you trust each agent.

agents.name: fraud-sweep-4h
agents.message: Scan recent activity for fraud signals and take permitted action. High-risk actions will queue for human approval.

agents.name: retention-daily
agents.message: Find at-risk users from today's survey signals and propose retention offers.

agents.name: support-triage-2h
agents.message: Triage and resolve open support items within your permissions.

agents.name: survey-quality-6h
agents.message: Review recent survey signals for quality and flag anomalies.
